item.title: Honda Dio 125 Price in Raichur
item.description: <![CDATA[No dual channel absNo 2x2 driving system powered to two wheels equally. These people could discover 2x drive system which no two wheeler manufacturers have evenmr done. No traction control. No cornering abs - totally making scooter the unsafe vehicle to drive Upgraded suspensions which has air damps air suspension . Outdated exterior, outdated technolgies in the scooter. Outdated engine oil usage, outdated engine mechanism where it's air cooled and not liquid cooled engine with more ventilation ...]]>
